Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER NOVATION CAPITAL LLC'S PETITION For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights BY PAUL R. KAVANAGH TO NOVATION CAPITAL LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: La Vena Ward CSR # 7077 =301/HK
